errorRunNotFound: Run not found — it may have expired from server memory. Try starting a new job from Start research.
errorStatusMayUpdate: Status below may still update — refresh or wait.
ledeFailed: Research stopped before completion. Details below.
ledeDoneSuffix: is in the catalogue — guidelines, doctors, trials and foundations are pending specialist verification.
ledeRunningSuffix: Each writes its results directly to the disease page as they land — you don't need to wait for the long guideline draft to finish.
seeResultsCta: See what we have so far →
collectingSub: Each card is its own pipeline. Results land directly on the disease page — this view is just a status mirror.
liveActivitySub: Audit log from the workflow engine — each event tagged with the workstream that emitted it. Newest first.
activityEmpty: Waiting for the workflow engine to report progress…
doneBannerIntro: is now in the catalogue. Draft guideline,
doneBannerWaitingClause: are waiting for specialist review — every section is marked
